examples.title: Dashboard — KPI row + spark + wide tile
examples.code:
<Bento Columns="3" Gap="Bento.BentoGap.Md">
    <KpiCard Label="Revenue" Value="$48,290" Delta="12.3" />
    <KpiCard Label="Active users" Value="12,402" Delta="4.8" />
    <KpiCard Label="MRR" Value="$9,820" Delta="-1.2" />
</Bento>
<Bento Columns="3" Gap="Bento.BentoGap.Md">
    <SparkCard Label="Page views" Value="184k" Data="@sparkA" />
    <SparkCard Label="Signups" Value="421" Data="@sparkB" />
    <BentoTile Title="Traffic" Description="Last 7 days">
        <Chart ... />
    </BentoTile>
</Bento>

parameters.name: Span
parameters.description: Number of grid columns the tile spans at the lg: breakpoint (1–6); narrower breakpoints widen automatically for tiles wider than 1. Default 1.

parameters.name: RowSpan
parameters.description: Number of grid rows the tile spans at the lg: breakpoint (1–4); stays single-row on mobile so content height drives layout. Default 1.

parameters.name: Title
parameters.description: The tile's heading text, shown above Description when HeaderContent isn't supplied.

parameters.name: Description
parameters.description: The tile's subheading text, shown below Title when HeaderContent isn't supplied.

parameters.name: HeaderContent
parameters.description: Custom header content, replacing the default Title/Description rendering.

parameters.name: FooterContent
parameters.description: Content rendered below a top border at the bottom of the tile.

parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the tile's root element.

parameters.description: Unmatched attributes splatted onto the tile's root element.

mdSummary:
# Bento

Masonry grid for dashboard tiles and marketing feature layouts.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Dashboard
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/bento

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Bento | Columns | `int` | `4` | Number of columns at the widest breakpoint. Values 1–6 get responsive Tailwind classes that collapse on mobile/tablet; other values fall back to an inline grid-template-columns with no responsive collapsing. Default 4. |
| Bento | Gap | `BentoGap` | `BentoGap.Md` | Gap between tiles. Default Md. |
| Bento | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the grid's root element. |
| Bento | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | The grid's tiles, typically a sequence of BentoTile elements. |
| Bento | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Unmatched attributes splatted onto the grid's root element. |
| BentoTile | Span | `int` | `1` | Number of grid columns the tile spans at the lg: breakpoint (1–6); narrower breakpoints widen automatically for tiles wider than 1. Default 1. |
| BentoTile | RowSpan | `int` | `1` | Number of grid rows the tile spans at the lg: breakpoint (1–4); stays single-row on mobile so content height drives layout. Default 1. |
| BentoTile | Title | `string?` | `` | The tile's heading text, shown above Description when HeaderContent isn't supplied. |
| BentoTile | Description | `string?` | `` | The tile's subheading text, shown below Title when HeaderContent isn't supplied. |
| BentoTile | HeaderContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | Custom header content, replacing the default Title/Description rendering. |
| BentoTile | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | The tile's main body content. |
| BentoTile | FooterContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | Content rendered below a top border at the bottom of the tile. |
| BentoTile | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the tile's root element. |
| BentoTile | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Unmatched attributes splatted onto the tile's root element. |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (Bento) — The grid's tiles, typically a sequence of BentoTile elements.
- `HeaderContent` (BentoTile) — Custom header content, replacing the default Title/Description rendering.
- `ChildContent` (BentoTile) — The tile's main body content.
- `FooterContent` (BentoTile) — Content rendered below a top border at the bottom of the tile.

## Events
- (none)

## Sub-components
- `BentoTile`

## Cascading values it expects
- (none)

## Services it injects
- (none)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<Bento />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-border`, `--color-card`, `--color-card-foreground`, `--color-foreground`, `--color-muted`, `--color-muted-foreground`, `--radius`

## Files
- `UI/Bento/Bento.razor`
- `UI/Bento/BentoTile.razor`
